title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Alstom India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Alstom India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Process Engineer looking for your next big career move? Alstom India in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Alstom India:
Alstom India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alstom India!
